sanskrit: एवं बुद्धेः परं बुद्ध्वा संस्तभ्यात्मानमात्मना। जहि शत्रुं महाबाहो कामरूपं दुरासदम्॥
transliteration: evaṃ buddheḥ paraṃ buddhvā saṃstabhyātmānam ātmanā | jahi śatruṃ mahā-bāho kāma-rūpaṃ durāsadam ||
literal_meaning: Thus, knowing the intellect to be superior, steady the self by the self, O mighty-armed one; conquer the enemy in the form of desire, hard to subdue.
contextual_meaning: Recognize that your observing awareness (higher mind) can witness and regulate the reactive mind; use this metacognitive stance to outmaneuver compulsive craving.
psychological_state: Empowered self-monitoring; shift from being hijacked by impulse to observing and redirecting it.
trigger_scenario: Late-night urge to doom-scroll or binge; remembering you can watch the urge instead of obeying it.
anchor_text: Watch your thoughts and guide them; tame desire with calm awareness.
